region.depth_slices: 26 slices centered at mid-depth (lo = max(0, d//2 - 13))
region.note: predict a probability map over exactly this 4096x4096 level-2 region

ground_truth.origin: 2023 Grand-Prize-era human ink annotation (villa ink-detection train_scrolls inklabels) registered onto the re-flattened SOTA geometry

registration.method: obj-exact: original.obj vt NN bridge via on-7.91um tifxyz (same pipeline as the segment's y4000_x2500 target), vt convention rowHv_colu
registration.validation_basis: DIRECT 4-candidate orientation probe (2026-07-11): rowHv_colu enrichment 3.13, clearly dominant over the 3 alternatives (0.81/1.50/1.10) — orientation validated for this region specifically, plus residual + periodicity gates
registration.caveat: ~8-voxel median correspondence residual smears stroke edges at 64px scale; scores are lower bounds on true agreement

role: second region of the train-exposed segment; TRAIN-EXPOSED for the distilled and GT-fine-tuned baseline models (disclosed); clean for any model not trained on this segment
